outputs.source_sufficiency_packet: Synthetic sufficiency review result: one bounded claim family is sufficient, one bounded claim family is blocked, and one owner follow-up remains open. The packet supports only a public-safe calibration decision about evidence sufficiency, not source authority promotion or final canon acceptance.
outputs.evidence_coverage_table:
claim_family | coverage_state | evidence_basis | decision
claim_family_a | sufficient | collected source packet facts satisfy the approved sufficiency policy for the bounded claim | allowed within ceiling
claim_family_b | blocked | missing layout guidance prevents the intended claim strength | blocked until guidance is supplied
owner_followup | open | one owner response remains unresolved | cannot close review fully
outputs.blocked_fields_register:
blocked_field | reason | unblock_condition
layout_guidance | required evidence is missing for claim_family_b | provide owner-approved or contract-allowed layout guidance source
owner_followup_response | follow-up remains open | owner resolves or explicitly defers the item
outputs.owner_followup_needed: Owner follow-up is needed for the open question tied to the blocked or unresolved sufficiency item. Until it is answered, the workflow may report a partial sufficiency result only.
outputs.allowed_claim_ceiling: Allowed claim ceiling: claim_family_a may be described as sufficient for the bounded synthetic scope. claim_family_b may only be described as blocked by missing layout guidance. The overall packet may not be described as fully sufficient, source-complete, canon-promoted, or validated against private/raw evidence.
outputs.rerun_routes: Rerun after missing layout guidance is added, after owner follow-up is resolved, or after the approved sufficiency policy changes. Rerun should preserve no-mutation behavior and keep blocked fields visible.
outputs.boundary_review_note: This is a public-safe synthetic review. It does not assert tool use, file edits, runtime paths, hidden references, private/raw evidence, or upstream mutation.

provenance: Public-safe synthetic workflow contract supplied in the prompt.
Synthetic scenario facts supplied in the prompt.
gaps: Missing layout guidance blocks one claim family.
downstream_handoff: Pass claim_family_a forward only with the bounded sufficient label and stated claim ceiling.
Return claim_family_b to evidence collection or owner follow-up before any stronger claim is made.
boundary_review_note: No upstream artifacts were mutated or claimed to be mutated.
No private/raw evidence, hidden refs, runtime paths, file edits, or tool use are asserted.
no_claims: Do not claim full source packet sufficiency for all claim families.
Do not claim canon promotion, source authority upgrade, private evidence review, or completed owner closure.
